name: recargarage-video
description: RecarGarage — geração de vídeos de marketing (Remotion) para Instagram, Google Ads e YouTube

scripts.render:all: npm run render && npm run render:square && npm run render:wide
scripts.render:reels: remotion render ReelProDashboard out/reels/01-painel-profissional.mp4 && remotion render ReelCrm out/reels/02-crm-clientes.mp4 && remotion render ReelLeads out/reels/03-leads-intencao.mp4 && remotion render ReelVerifiedSeller out/reels/04-vendedor-verificado.mp4 && remotion render ReelAiListing out/reels/05-anuncios-ia.mp4 && remotion render ReelPricing out/reels/06-preco-certo.mp4 && remotion render ReelWorkshop out/reels/07-oficina-visivel.mp4 && remotion render ReelChat out/reels/08-chat-integrado.mp4 && remotion render ReelParts out/reels/09-balcao-pecas.mp4 && remotion render ReelEcosystem out/reels/10-ecossistema-pro.mp4 && remotion render ReelSpin360 out/reels/11-vista-360.mp4 && remotion render ReelPartsFinder out/reels/12-peca-rapida.mp4 && remotion render ReelRepairFlip out/reels/13-carros-para-restaurar.mp4 && remotion render ReelAudioListing out/reels/14-anuncio-por-audio.mp4 && remotion render ReelStandImport out/reels/15-importar-standvirtual.mp4 && remotion render ReelLaunchBrazil out/reels/16-lancamento-brasil.mp4 && remotion render ReelService out/reels/17-prestacao-servico.mp4
scripts.render:reels:br: remotion render ReelProDashboardBR out/reels/br/01-painel-profissional-br.mp4 && remotion render ReelCrmBR out/reels/br/02-crm-clientes-br.mp4 && remotion render ReelLeadsBR out/reels/br/03-leads-intencao-br.mp4 && remotion render ReelVerifiedSellerBR out/reels/br/04-vendedor-verificado-br.mp4 && remotion render ReelAiListingBR out/reels/br/05-anuncios-ia-br.mp4 && remotion render ReelPricingBR out/reels/br/06-preco-certo-br.mp4 && remotion render ReelWorkshopBR out/reels/br/07-oficina-visivel-br.mp4 && remotion render ReelChatBR out/reels/br/08-chat-integrado-br.mp4 && remotion render ReelPartsBR out/reels/br/09-balcao-pecas-br.mp4 && remotion render ReelEcosystemBR out/reels/br/10-ecossistema-pro-br.mp4 && remotion render ReelSpin360BR out/reels/br/11-vista-360-br.mp4 && remotion render ReelPartsFinderBR out/reels/br/12-peca-rapida-br.mp4 && remotion render ReelRepairFlipBR out/reels/br/13-carros-para-restaurar-br.mp4 && remotion render ReelAudioListingBR out/reels/br/14-anuncio-por-audio-br.mp4 && remotion render ReelLaunchBrazilBR out/reels/br/15-lancamento-brasil-br.mp4 && remotion render ReelServiceBR out/reels/br/16-prestacao-servico-br.mp4
